calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-016 supervised terrain calibration (MECH-150 cue context differentiation)
items.note: Adds supervised terrain_loss (lambda=0.1) to E1 training, training extract_cue_context() pathway end-to-end. Tests whether cue_context differentiates hazard-proximate vs distal contexts (C1 cosine_sim<0.85, C2 r(w_harm,hazard)>0.5, C3 r(w_goal,hazard)<-0.3). Prerequisite for EXQ-183/184 (MECH-152/ARC-041).
